name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into.

## Proposed solution

How you think it should work. Be as specific as you can — UI sketches, API shapes, workflow descriptions are all helpful.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why this one seems better.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, references, related issues.
